  "findings": [
    "Misreading or misapplying APWA uniform color codes for utility marking (red, yellow, blue, green, orange)."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop any excavation or sitework in the affected area.",
    "Remark the utility lines using the correct APWA color-coding standards.",
    "Re-verify all utility locates with the local 811 one-call center and utility operators."
  ],
  "rationale": "Misidentifying utility mark colors poses an extreme safety hazard, as it can lead to accidental strikes of high-voltage electrical lines or high-pressure gas mains during excavation. The APWA Uniform Color Code must be strictly adhered to per CGA Best Practices.",
  "references": [
    "CGA Best Practices Version 18.0, Section 3-14: Uniform Color Code",
    "ANSI Standard Z535.1"
  ]
}
